label: Preference learning

node.label: Preference learning
node.definition: Pairwise rankings or comparative judgments teach which outputs or behaviors are preferred.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Preference learning is to connect Supervised learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences to downstream capabilities including Margin, ranking & metric objectives, Reward modeling, Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families).
examples: substrate for Margin, ranking & metric objectives
substrate for Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families)
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.

dependencies.rationale: Preference learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Preference learning uses Labels, targets, rewards & preferences as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Preference learning uses Game theory & decision theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
